Name: Lightning Wisp
Boss Passive: Always Costs to Equip gear this round
T2Boss: +5 Attack, Gear costs +1 more to equip this round,
T3Boss: Pay 1 Alien per equiped gear when boss revealed, otherwise unequip that gear

Name: Null Engineer
Boss Passive: Gear effects cost Tech 5 to activate
T2Boss: +5 Attack, Gear effects cost +1 Tech more to activate,
T3Boss: Gear also costs +1 Alien to activate

Name: Shadow Fiend
T5Boss: Reveal Effects trigger additional time, once per lane

Name: Plasma Channeler
Boss Passive: No Shields for Allies or Enemies
T3Boss: Gain Shields = Shield lost from passive

Name: Rust Elemental
Boss Passive: No Armor for Allies or Enemies
T3Boss: Gain armor for every unit that loses armor this way (Up to 10)

Name: The Balance
Boss Passive: Damage is Spread evenly among active units depending on team, When Enemy is Revealed give this boss Shield = that units HP
T3Boss: Every time a unit dies, deal 10 damage to the teams units
T5Boss: Combine HP and damage of all units, this number is now their HP and attack

Name: The Root
Boss Passive: Tech income this round turned to Organic
T5Boss: Gains attack = organics owned by players

Name: Undeath
Boss Passive: Enemies Revive on 1 HP after 1st death, they deal half damage
T3Boss: Killed Friendlies revive on enemy lane at 1hp and half damage

Name: Aegis Eater
T3Boss: Enemies gain damage = half of shield

Name: Wreathing Mass
Boss Passive: Take top 5 units of the enemy deck and add half their stats to this boss. When losing enough HP to kill one of the attached units, remove it from the boss losing its stats.
T5Boss: 1st enemy to die each lane is merged into this boss

Name: The Culling
Boss Passive: Enemies Delete units of lower Rank
T3Boss: Heal 10 kill, gain 5 attack on kill

Name: Skinwalkers
Boss Passive: Combat Start, Take Top 5 units of the graveyard and add their stats and abilities to this unit, if 5 units are not available use the Shop deck instead
T5Boss: Killing a unit adds them to the enemy lane with half stats

Name: Dread Echo
Boss Passive: Boss hits all Lanes each time an enemy dies
T5Boss: Death hits deal double damage to units under half HP

Name: The Thing
Boss Passive: Equipment from killed units get added to this boss
T3Boss: Combat Start, Take Top 5 Gear of the Recycling and add their stats and abilities to this unit, if 5 cards are not available use the Shop deck instead
